_comment_2: Minimum-viable Tyk Classic API definition. No auth, no rate limit, no transforms — pure proxy. The catch-all listen_path: '/' lets every fixture probe (/status/200, /anything, /bytes/1024) reach the upstream go-httpbin without per-path routing. strip_listen_path: false means '/' is added back, which keeps the path semantics identical (i.e. '/anything' on the gateway hits '/anything' on the upstream).
_comment_3: use_keyless: true disables Tyk's session/auth pipeline entirely. This is the documented way to ship a vanilla pass-through API per https://tyk.io/docs/tyk-apis/tyk-gateway-api/api-definition-objects/general/.
name: bench
